expectations.text: Distinguishes localization/transcreation from literal translation rather than just offering to translate the text
expectations.evidence: Frames Japan as a re-launch / transcreation not translation; three-approach table.

expectations.text: Calls for native, in-market review before launch (not machine translation alone)
expectations.evidence: Native Japanese marketer/review called the highest-leverage step.

expectations.text: Raises market/cultural adaptation: local proof/case studies, imagery, buying behavior, or channel differences (e.g. dominant platforms differ in Japan)
expectations.evidence: Ringi consensus buying, density-as-trust, comparison sites, APPI, support-as-product.

expectations.text: Mentions locale mechanics (formality register, text expansion/layout, date/currency, or international SEO/keywords researched fresh)
expectations.evidence: JPY pricing, 税抜/税込, date formats, keigo register, 特商法 page.

expectations.text: Delivers an actionable plan on stated assumptions rather than only asking questions
expectations.evidence: Full plan plus a 90-day sequence on stated assumptions.
